meaning.zh: 慈悲、直覺、情感的豐沛與深刻的同理心。
meaning.en: Compassion, intuition, emotional depth, and deep empathy.

ecology.zh: 成年雌性石虎，守護著育幼區的生態平衡，充滿生存智慧。
ecology.en: A mature female leopard cat maintaining balance in nursery areas with wisdom.

generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. A soulful and compassionate anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat (Queen) sitting on a shell-decorated throne by a crystal stream. She gazes into an ornate golden cup. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, white forehead stripes, white eye-liner, and large white spots behind ears. Reflective deep-water blues. 2:3 vertical. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Queen of Cups embodies the intuitive protector—the mother leopard cat who masters the wisdom of the forest waters.
